entry.title: IDC FA820317D1226 (P00018) awarded to AAR GOVERNMENT SERVICES, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: FB2029 OO ALC DDHU CNTRL RCV

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: LANDING GEAR PERFORMANCE BASED LOGISTICS ONE (LGPBL1)

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER AIRCRAFT PARTS AND AUXILIARY EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
